member.name: M:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.UI.PathTrimming.TruncatePath(System.String,System.Single,Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.UI.ICalcTextSize,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Truncates a path to fit within the available width using binary search. Always preserves the beginning and end of the path when truncating.

member.name: M:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.UI.PathTrimming.FindLastSeparator(System.String)
member.summary: Finds the last occurrence of either forward slash or backslash separator. Works cross-platform for both Windows and Unix-style paths.

member.name: M:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.UI.PathTrimming.TruncateMid(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Truncates the given string to the number of characters given by the length parameter. The value is truncated (if necessary) by removing characters from the middle of the string and inserting an ellipsis in their place.

member.name: M:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.UI.PathTrimming.TruncatePathByLength(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: String truncation for paths. This method takes a path and returns it truncated (if necessary) to the exact number of characters specified by the length parameter.

member.name: T:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.CredentialsResponse
member.summary: Response to credentials request. Internal usage. This isn't a public API.

member.name: P:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.CredentialsResponse.Error
member.summary: Error caused by the request.

member.name: T:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.CredentialsResponse.TokenType
member.summary: Type of the token.

member.name: F:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.CredentialsResponse.TokenType.Password
member.summary: Password token.

member.name: F:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.CredentialsResponse.TokenType.Bearer
member.summary: Bearer token.

member.name: P:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.CredentialsResponse.Type
member.summary: Get the type of the token.

member.name: F:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.CredentialsResponse.Email
member.summary: The user's email.

member.name: F:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.CredentialsResponse.Token
member.summary: The credential's token.

member.name: F:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.CredentialsResponse.TokenTypeValue
member.summary: The token type represented as an integer.

member.name: T:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.CurrentUserAdminCheckResponse
member.summary: Response to current user admin check request. Internal usage. This isn't a public API.

member.name: P:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.CurrentUserAdminCheckResponse.Error
member.summary: Error caused by the request.

member.name: T:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.TokenExchangeResponse
member.summary: Response to token exchange request. Internal usage. This isn't a public API.

member.name: P:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.TokenExchangeResponse.Error
member.summary: Error caused by the request.

member.name: P:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.TokenExchangeResponse.User
member.summary: The user's username.

member.name: P:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.TokenExchangeResponse.AccessToken
member.summary: The access token.

member.name: P:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.WebApi.TokenExchangeResponse.RefreshToken
member.summary: The refresh token.

member.name: F:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.AssetUtils.Processor.UnityCloudProjectLinkMonitor.CloudSettingsFactory
member.summary: Factory class to retrieve the cloud settings for the current project.

member.name: M:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.AssetUtils.Processor.UnityCloudProjectLinkMonitor.CheckCloudProjectAlignmentAsync(Codice.CM.Common.WorkspaceInfo)
member.summary: Checks if the workspace project is aligned with the linked project in the cloud settings (if any). If not, logs a warning message for users to inform about the issue and give indications on how to re-link.

member.name: M:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.SetupUnityEditionToken.CreateCloudEditionTokenIfNeeded
member.summary: If the UVCS installation directory is found, synchronize the token file from it. Else, create the "cloudedition.token" file unconditionally so it's treated as a Cloud Edition going forward.

member.name: M:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.QueryVisualElementsExtensions.Show``1(UnityEngine.UIElements.UQueryBuilder{``0})
member.summary: Shows the element regardless if it is has been hidden or collapsed.

member.name: M:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.QueryVisualElementsExtensions.Collapse``1(UnityEngine.UIElements.UQueryBuilder{``0})
member.summary: Removes the element from the layout, freeing its space and position.

member.name: M:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.QueryVisualElementsExtensions.Hide``1(UnityEngine.UIElements.UQueryBuilder{``0})
member.summary: Hides the element while preserving its space and position in the layout.

member.name: M:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.VisualElementExtensions.Show``1(``0)
member.summary: Shows the element regardless if it is has been hidden or collapsed.

member.name: M:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.VisualElementExtensions.Collapse``1(``0)
member.summary: Removes the element from the layout, freeing its space and position.

member.name: M:Unity.PlasticSCM.Editor.VisualElementExtensions.Hide``1(``0)
member.summary: Hides the element while preserving its space and position in the layout.
